entity.summary: Fluent-network concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange using a Uniswap V3-style market design with current liquidity, fee generation, protocol revenue, and active spot trading volume.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies FluxFlow V3 as a Uniswap V3-style Fluent CLMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. HEI records the entity as FluxFlow rather than using a version-only canonical identity. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: FluxFlow project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: FluxFlow V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current protocol registry identifies FluxFlow V3 as a Fluent CLMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: FluxFlow DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FluxFlow V3 as a Fluent decentralized exchange; HEI consolidates the version-labelled source representation into one FluxFlow entity.
